author: @rakeshpatil1983
text: Nice. I tried the same . But the voltage drop is around 800 volts for 1 A drop for 40 SWG 1500 turns on the center coils. I'm not getting the same results. It seems I need more voltage and more current to drive the flux to complete one side. Can you please provide the materials and turns in the coils you used .. ? Thanks a lot.
